projects.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
projects.description:
Built a machine learning fraud detection system on 284K real-world credit card transactions (0.17% fraud) using Random Forest, XGBoost, and LightGBM, achieving ~0.97 ROC-AUC.

While the GitHub and Video focus on the technical Credit Card Fraud Detection pipeline, the Published Magazine ('Future of Banking: AI, Neo Finance, Knowledge Capital, Innovation, and Technology Shaping the Future of Finance') and the GitLab site ('Chronological Rise of AI-Driven FinTech: From Emergence to Decentralisation') provide a holistic analysis of the evolving FinTech landscape.

projects.title: Mortgage Lifecycle Analytics Platform
projects.description: A comparative institutional analysis of mortgage collection processes and regulatory frameworks between India and France. The platform explores the specific rules, legal structures, and key institutional players involved in mortgage lifecycles, contrasting traditional recovery systems with evolving fintech models.

projects.title: Earthquake Data Analysis & Hotspot Exploration
projects.description: Analyzed 4,424 historical earthquake records (2150 BC–2020 AD) from NOAA and validated findings with 183 modern USGS events, using temporal indicators, spatial clustering (KMeans, k=5), and Dash/Plotly dashboards to identify long-term seismic trends and geographic hotspots.

projects.title: Business Analyst AI Agent (LLM)
projects.description: Developed a GenAI financial analysis agent that automatically extracts insights from earnings reports and financial data using LLMs, Next.js, and AI reasoning workflows, generating structured business analysis for faster decision-making.

projects.title: Finance Chatbot
projects.description: Designed a Python-based financial analytics chatbot that reads structured financial datasets and answers queries on revenue, net income, and financial ratios, enabling automated financial analysis through rule-based intelligence.

projects.title: Eco-Respire Sustainability Platform
projects.description: Conceptualized an AI-enabled circular economy platform converting agricultural waste into renewable energy using IoT monitoring, data analytics, and tokenized sustainability incentives.

projects.title: Fraud Detection Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Built an interactive fraud analytics dashboard analyzing transaction patterns and anomaly signals using Python, data visualization, and statistical analysis to support fraud investigation and monitoring.

soft_skills.description: Connecting data insights to real business outcomes.
Breaking complex systems into structured analytical solutions.

approach.title: How I Approach Complex Problems
approach.intro: My work sits at the intersection of domain expertise, analytical thinking, and modern data technologies. Over the years I have worked across engineering systems, financial operations, and risk management, and more recently in AI, machine learning, and data analytics. This journey has shaped the way I approach complex problems: not as isolated technical challenges, but as systems that require understanding from multiple perspectives.
approach.methodology: When faced with a problem, I start by understanding its context and structure — the business environment, the risks involved, and the decisions that ultimately need to be made. From there, I move into data exploration and analytical modelling, using statistical analysis, machine learning techniques, and modern AI tools to uncover patterns that are not immediately visible.
approach.philosophy: Technology alone does not solve problems. The real value emerges when domain understanding, data, and intelligent systems work together.

lenses.name: Domain thinking
lenses.description: understanding financial systems, risk dynamics, and operational realities

lenses.name: Analytical thinking
lenses.description: structuring problems, exploring data, and building models

lenses.name: Technological capability
lenses.description: applying machine learning, analytics, and AI to generate insights

approach.conclusion: The goal is not simply to build models, but to transform complex information into decisions that are clear, practical, and grounded in evidence. In a world increasingly shaped by data and automation, organizations need people who can connect business context, analytical reasoning, and intelligent systems. My focus is to contribute at that intersection — designing solutions where data, technology, and human judgement reinforce each other.
approach.representation: This framework reflects the way I approach systems: Engineering discipline, Financial domain understanding, Data and AI capabilities. Together they create a way of thinking that turns complex problems into structured, solvable systems.

pipeline.description: Defining the boundaries and environment of the challenge.
Deep dive into finance, risk, and operational dynamics.
Formulating key questions, hypotheses, and decision metrics.
Identifying structured data, signals, and operational records.
Applying statistics, machine learning, and predictive analysis.
Using LLMs for pattern interpretation and scenario exploration.
Evaluating multiple potential solutions and their impacts.

deepDive.future_direction:
I see my future at the intersection of technology, data, and strategic decision-making. My goal is to become a manager who understands technology well enough to use it effectively.

Building on my background in engineering, financial systems, and risk management, I am strengthening my understanding of AI, data analytics, and intelligent systems so that I can help organizations translate complex data into clear business decisions.

Over time, I aim to contribute in roles where technology, analytics, and management come together—helping teams adopt AI responsibly, improve decision processes, and create sustainable value across industries.

technical_experiments.title: ✈️ Flight & Passenger Management System — Prototype
technical_experiments.description: Designed a prototype system for managing flight schedules, passenger records, and operational workflows, demonstrating how aviation data systems organize and process flight information. The project models core airline operations including passenger tracking, flight scheduling, and operational data management, reflecting real-world airline system structures.

technical_experiments.title: Intelligent Traffic Computer Vision System
technical_experiments.description: Developed a computer vision system for traffic analysis, using image classification and machine learning models to detect vehicle patterns and improve traffic monitoring insights.

technical_experiments.title: TCP Port Scanner (Rust)
technical_experiments.description: Built a multi-threaded TCP port scanner in Rust capable of scanning 1,000+ ports concurrently, demonstrating low-level networking, concurrency, and system-level performance optimization.

technical_experiments.title: 📊 Data Cleaning & Imbalance Handling (ML Experiment)
technical_experiments.description:
Performed data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and class imbalance handling for machine learning datasets. Implemented techniques such as data cleaning, feature inspection, and resampling methods to prepare datasets for reliable model training and evaluation.

This experiment demonstrates the importance of data preparation pipelines before applying machine learning models.
